# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_images (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances OS images of the tenant.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all OS images of the tenant.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_images" "all" {}

output "image_names" {
  value = [for i in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_images.all.images : i.name]
}

# Filter in HCL, e.g. only the Linux images.
output "linux_images" {
  value = [
    for i in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_images.all.images :
    i.name if i.os_family == "linux"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `availability_zone_id` (String) Filter images by availability zone ID.
- `instance_family_id` (String) Filter images by instance family ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `images` (List of Object) The list of images. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `categories` (List of String)
- `compatible_families` (List of String)
- `description_en` (String)
- `disk_sizes_gb` (List of Number)
- `editor` (String)
- `family` (String)
- `icon` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `image_type` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `os_family` (String)
- `os_name` (String)
- `os_version` (String)
- `version` (String)
